---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

background-image: url('libs/Images/00-Pizza_and_Politics_Poster-Mar24.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center




---
class: slideblue

.size80[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size45[
Explore the Success Cases
]

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2022)
]]

???

## Prep for class
1. Review submissions of success cases
    - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1BAWHKKjeiTdfzLzpPedE-mpHdaSoGL_Uf8MpIMH6BV0/edit?usp=sharing

2. Prep email with link to Google Doc for collecting unsuccessful cases
    - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1j6jyM2L5k0eeK02ajr7-IGPVBySXP2Nifl5fTNbGj2E/edit?usp=sharing

<br>

### Current events check-in?



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size70[**Paper 2**]

<br>

.size55[.center[Should the US use force (military or economic) to compel other states to behave in line with our interests?]]

???

### Questions on the prompt?




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size60[**For Today**]

<br>

.size45[
Find us a .textblue[**specific**], real world case of the US using force (military or economic) to .textblue[**successfully**] change the behavior of .textblue[**another state**].

Submit the .textblue[**APA citation**] before class (no overlap!).
]

???

We had an assignment for today.

### Has everyone submitted their citation to the shared Google Doc?



---

class: middle, slidegreen

.size50[**APA Style (Source: Purdue OWL)**]

### Books
.size30[Author, A. A. (Year of publication). *Title of work: Capital letter also for subtitle*. Publisher Name. DOI]

### Journals, Magazines, Newspapers
.size30[Author, A. A., Author, B. B., & Author, C. C. (Year). Title of article. *Title of Periodical*, volume number(issue number), pages. DOI]

### Webpage / Online Content
.size30[Lastname, F. M. (Year, Month Date). *Title of page*. Site name. URL]

???

Ok, take a few minutes and review all of the sources.

### Are all of these formatted correctly?

Remember, the goal here is to help each other.
- You're not calling anybody out!
- We want everyone to format correctly!

<br>

**Incorrect citations must be corrected by that student.**

### Any questions on apa formatting of citations?

<br>

### Are all of these examples of evidence that is high enough quality to answer our big question? Why or why not?




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size60[**Let's Explore your Cases!**]

.size45[
1. What state did the US target?

2. Why were they targeted?

3. What specifically did the US do to that state?

4. Why do you believe this was a success?
]

???

Let's hear your evidence in support of an interventionist America!

Everybody take a couple minutes and get ready to present your case as an answer to these four questions.

<br>

Ok, let's hear your cases!



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size70[**Paper 2**]

<br>

.size55[.center[Should the US use force (military or economic) to compel other states to behave in line with our interests?]]

???

*Form groups of 3*

In small groups you now have X minutes to brainstorm an argument that answers this question in the affirmative.

I want to hear your strongest premises in favor of an interventionist America!

*Share and Discuss*



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size60[**For Wednesday**]

<br>

.size45[
Find us a .textblue[**specific**], real world case of the US using force (military or economic) to change the behavior of another state but .textblue[**failing**] to achieve its aims.

Submit the .textblue[**APA citation**] before class (no overlap!).
]

???

**Send email to class!**

For Wednesday everyone has to find us a real world example we could use to make the negative case.

- e.g. The US should NOT use force!

<br>

You must submit the citation to your evidence before class.

- No overlapping cases!

- First-come, first-served!

### Questions on the prompt?
